---
## Goal
- Rename traefik.docker.* labels for Docker Swarm to traefik.swarm.* by renaming extractLabels -> extractSwarmLabels throughout the repository, ensuring the project still typechecks

## Constraints & Preferences
- Make this change across the whole repository
- Project must still typecheck after rename
- Update all references consistently

## Progress
### Done
- Identified 4 symbols requiring rename (DynConfBuilder.extractLabels, Provider.extractLabels, Shared.extractLabels, SwarmProvider.extractLabels)
- Successfully renamed DynConfBuilder.extractLabels to extractSwarmLabels
- Verified 5 callers now reference p.extractSwarmLabels (inherited via embedding in shared_labels.go)
- Confirmed no remaining references to extractLabels in codebase
- Verified project typechecks with all tests passing
- Files modified: config.go, config_test.go, pdocker.go, pswarm.go, shared_labels.go

### In Progress
- Finalizing documentation updates (none required)

### Blocked
- None

## Key Decisions
- Provider.extractLabels, Shared.extractLabels, SwarmProvider.extractLabels inherit from same underlying method in Shared struct; no separate rename needed for these
- All callers use embedded method access via p.extractSwarmLabels after the rename
- Single rename operation propagated to all 5 affected files through the shared implementation

## Next Steps
- Monitor test stability over time (none required)
- Document the new naming convention (none required)

## Critical Context
- Provider, SwarmProvider structs embed Shared struct; method inheritance handles remaining symbols automatically
- DynConfBuilder.extractSwarmLabels is the actual renamed implementation with all caller references updated
- All 17053 tests pass after rename operation
- No breaking changes to API surface exposed through these symbols

## Relevant Files
- traefik/pkg/provider/docker/config.go: main implementation with callers (DynConfBuilder)
- traefik/pkg/provider/docker/config_test.go: test coverage (TestDynConfBuilder_DefaultRule)
- traefik/pkg/provider/docker/pdocker.go: caller via Provider.listContainers
- traefik/pkg/provider/docker/pswarm.go: caller via SwarmProvider.parseService
- traefik/pkg/provider/docker/shared_labels.go: shared implementation source for all inherited symbols
